---
title: "Real Analysis for Modelers"
subtitle: "Core Mathematics — Year 1"
date: "2025-01-01"
toc: true
toc-depth: 2
number-sections: true
---

# Real Analysis for Modelers

**Track**: Core Mathematics — Year 1

A rigorous treatment of real analysis with emphasis on the tools most essential for modeling: metric space theory, convergence, integration theory, and function spaces. Prepares the student for measure-theoretic probability and functional analysis.

## Table of Contents

1. The Real Number System and Completeness
2. Metric Spaces: The Language of Proximity
3. Compactness
4. Connectedness and Continuity
5. Sequences and Series of Functions
6. Differentiation in Several Variables
7. Riemann Integration and Its Limitations
8. Introduction to Measure and Lebesgue Integration
9. Lp Spaces: A First Look at Function Spaces
10. Fixed Point Theorems and Applications to Modeling

---

## Chapter 1: The Real Number System and Completeness

*This chapter has not yet been generated. Run the generation pipeline to produce full content.*

## Chapter 2: Metric Spaces: The Language of Proximity

*This chapter has not yet been generated. Run the generation pipeline to produce full content.*

## Chapter 3: Compactness

*This chapter has not yet been generated. Run the generation pipeline to produce full content.*

## Chapter 4: Connectedness and Continuity

*This chapter has not yet been generated. Run the generation pipeline to produce full content.*

## Chapter 5: Sequences and Series of Functions

*This chapter has not yet been generated. Run the generation pipeline to produce full content.*

## Chapter 6: Differentiation in Several Variables

*This chapter has not yet been generated. Run the generation pipeline to produce full content.*

## Chapter 7: Riemann Integration and Its Limitations

*This chapter has not yet been generated. Run the generation pipeline to produce full content.*

## Chapter 8: Introduction to Measure and Lebesgue Integration

*This chapter has not yet been generated. Run the generation pipeline to produce full content.*

## Chapter 9: Lp Spaces: A First Look at Function Spaces

*This chapter has not yet been generated. Run the generation pipeline to produce full content.*

## Chapter 10: Fixed Point Theorems and Applications to Modeling

*This chapter has not yet been generated. Run the generation pipeline to produce full content.*
